reason: Created follow-up child task scaffold and initial PRD for the Skill Tests execution-trace UI refactor, covering Publish Gate removal, clearer run/step trace presentation, and staged frontend modularization.

Completed PR1 frontend cleanup for Skill Tests: removed the Publish Gate toolbar control, stopped persisting and restoring its localStorage state, stopped sending publishGate in run payloads, and cleaned overview/hint text so the page no longer surfaces that mode.

Started PR2 by tightening the task PRD around chain-first visibility, then added a chain/single list filter, chain-specific case card headers with mini rails and long-chain collapse, and a static chain rail summary in the detail header without changing runner semantics.

Continued PR2/PR3 by extracting reusable run-detail and chain-rail view helpers into public/skill-tests/, wiring eval-cases.html to load them, and rebinding skill-tests.js to those modules while keeping the existing chain visibility and unified run summary/trace presentation behavior.

Stopped further scope expansion and finished the planned PR3 modularization pass for the Skill Tests page: environment rendering, case runs/detail/form loaders, shared panel states, summary/selected-skill overview, and case-list rendering now live in focused helpers under public/skill-tests/ while public/skill-tests.js stays as wiring and page orchestration.
